text_candidates.next_sentence: Uber performs due diligence regarding its third-party suppliers, service providers and business partners.

text_candidates.sentence_text: Uber also undergoes annual audits to maintain its ISO 27001 certification for its core mobility, delivery, and enterprise businesses, and SOC 2 attestations that vary depending on the Uber product.
text_candidates.previous_sentence: As a global organization, Uber undergoes annual audits to maintain its certification as a Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS 4.0) Level 1 Merchant and Service provider.
text_candidates.next_sentence: 45 • Cyber incident management.

text_candidates.sentence_text: Key elements of this program include: • Oversight and Governance.
text_candidates.previous_sentence: The cybersecurity program is designed to assess, identify, and manage risks from cybersecurity threats.
text_candidates.next_sentence: Uber's Board oversees the cybersecurity program, and Uber's risk profile with respect to cybersecurity matters, through regular reports and reviews.
